title: Mother And Babe
content:
I see the sleeping babe, nestling the breast of its mother;
The sleeping mother and babe-hush'd, I study them long and long.
meaning:
Walt Whitman's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Mother And Babe"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
